title: Add startup CWD guard and fix path resolution
summary: Implement a startup CWD check to error on root CWD and ensure path resolution is centralized and correct.
acceptance_criteria: Startup checks CWD and errors when CWD is "/".
Path resolution logic is centralized in a single location.
The centralized path resolution expands paths relative to CWD correctly.

steps.description: Identify or create the single path resolution entry point and ensure all tools route through it.
Add a startup guard that validates CWD and returns a clear error when it is "/".
Update or add tests to cover CWD guard and path expansion behavior.

notes: Ensure the guard does not break normal execution when CWD is a project directory.
Keep error messaging consistent with existing error handling patterns.
